headline: Q1 Earnings Outperformers: Allegion (NYSE:ALLE) And The Rest Of The Electrical Systems Stocks
summary: Wrapping up Q1 earnings, we look at the numbers and key takeaways for the electrical systems stocks, including Allegion (NYSE:ALLE) and its peers.
